currentTask: JunoMac rebuilt as one three-region native product opening on Chat (043051b): unified sidebar carrying destinations plus recency-grouped conversation history, borderless Markdown transcript (new JunoMarkdown block parser, 24 tests), native resizable inspector, floating glass composer with per-conversation drafts. Shared junoDisplayModelName replaces a mobile-local copy so no raw model id reaches either UI. Four defects fixed and verified in the running app via its live accessibility tree (screencapture and macOS XCUITest are both unavailable in this sandbox): container accessibilityIdentifier silently overriding the composer's and Send's own, icon-only buttons unnamed for VoiceOver with SF Symbol ids leaking as identifiers, raw model id in the window subtitle, and JunoMacNavigationTests asserting count==9 against a seven-case enum (it had been failing; STATUS.md's 'JunoMacTests 2/2' was stale). Keychain errors now carry their OSStatus, which revealed that every CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build cannot sign in at all (-34018 errSecMissingEntitlement) - those commands were compile gates, not run gates. Artifacts built in dist/: macOS .app+.dmg (Apple Development signed, hardened runtime, universal), development .ipa (1 device, profile expires 2026-07-29), signed simulator .app.zip, checksums. NOT DONE: phases 5-16 and 18. No deploy, main untouched, origin/main still 173be21. NEXT: phase 5 backend reconciliation - triage the uncommitted Remote-session work still sitting in the main checkout, then rebase PR #19 onto PR #18. See docs/native/NEXT_PROMPT.md.
